AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in ('Сб','Вс') and "Услуга" not in ('_3.10 Социальные выплаты - AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5 inner join ( Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from ( Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from ( SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во", "День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн'' END AS "День недели" ,sat1.date_th AS "Дата", sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" like ''%Материнский (семейный) капитал%'' and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район" '') near "1111": syntax error

(Строк изменено - 1) INSERT INTO QUERY (QUERY, REM, ID_CONNECTION, NAME) VALUES ('WITH dummy(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY --пишем дни исключения ), dummy3(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY --пишем дни исключения ) Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),''39'', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from ( Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from ( Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from ( SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во", "День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн'' END AS "День недели" ,sat1.date_th AS "Дата", sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" like '%РњР°С‚РµСЂРёРЅСЃРєРёР№ (СЃРµРјРµР№РЅС‹Р№) РєР°РїРёС‚Р°Р»%' and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T6 on T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" = T6."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"  SQLExecDirectW: {42601} [IBM][CLI Driver][DB2/NT64] SQL0104N  An unexpected token "END-OF-STATEMENT" was found following "CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY". (Строк изменено - 1) INSERT INTO QUERY (NAME, QUERY, REM, ID_CONNECTION) VALUES ('НАЗВАНИЕ', 'WITH dummy(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY  ), dummy3(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY  ) Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Район"),''39'', T5."Район",T5."Есть за 5 дней",T5."Нет за 5 дней",T6."Есть за 3 дня",T6."Нет за 3 дня" from ( Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 5 дней"  ,"Район" from ( Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from ( SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во", "День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн'' END AS "День недели" ,sat1.date_th AS "Дата", sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5 inner join ( Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from ( Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from ( SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во", "День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс'' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн'' END AS "День недели" ,sat1.date_th AS "Дата", sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" like ''%Материнский (семейный) капитал%'' and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район" ', 'ОПИСАНИЕ', '131')

2022/11/15 13:30:15 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY  ), dummy3(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY  ) Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"),'39', T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ",T5."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T5."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T6."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",T6."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" from ( Select Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" = 0 then '+' END as "Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" <> 0 then '+' END as "РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№"  ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( Select Sum("РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ") as "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( SELECT case when "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" END AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё","Р”Р°С‚Р°","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Р’С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'РЎСЂ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Р§С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'РџС‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'РЎР±' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Р’СЃ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'РџРЅ' END AS "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" ,sat1.date_th AS "Р”Р°С‚Р°", sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' РјРёРЅ.)' AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T5 inner join ( Select Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" = 0 then '+' END as "Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" <> 0 then '+' END as "РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( Select Sum("РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ") as "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( SELECT case when "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" END AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё","Р”Р°С‚Р°","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Р’С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'РЎСЂ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Р§С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'РџС‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'РЎР±' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Р’СЃ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'РџРЅ' END AS "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" ,sat1.date_th AS "Р”Р°С‚Р°", sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' РјРёРЅ.)' AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" like '%РњР°С‚РµСЂРёРЅСЃРєРёР№ (СЃРµРјРµР№РЅС‹Р№) РєР°РїРёС‚Р°Р»%' and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T6 on T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" = T6."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"

2022/11/15 13:30:41 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBQuery Выполнение SQL запроса WITH dummy(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY  ), dummy3(id,dw) as ( select TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE) id,DAYOFWEEK(CURRENT_DATE)-1 dw from SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 union all select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 3 DAY  ) Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"),'39', T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ",T5."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T5."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T6."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",T6."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" from ( Select Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" = 0 then '+' END as "Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" <> 0 then '+' END as "РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№"  ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( Select Sum("РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ") as "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( SELECT case when "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" END AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё","Р”Р°С‚Р°","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Р’С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'РЎСЂ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Р§С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'РџС‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'РЎР±' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Р’СЃ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'РџРЅ' END AS "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" ,sat1.date_th AS "Р”Р°С‚Р°", sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' РјРёРЅ.)' AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T5 inner join ( Select Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" = 0 then '+' END as "Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" <> 0 then '+' END as "РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( Select Sum("РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ") as "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( SELECT case when "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" END AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё","Р”Р°С‚Р°","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Р’С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'РЎСЂ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Р§С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'РџС‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'РЎР±' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Р’СЃ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'РџРЅ' END AS "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" ,sat1.date_th AS "Р”Р°С‚Р°", sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' РјРёРЅ.)' AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" like '%РњР°С‚РµСЂРёРЅСЃРєРёР№ (СЃРµРјРµР№РЅС‹Р№) РєР°РїРёС‚Р°Р»%' and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T6 on T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" = T6."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"

AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T5 inner join ( Select Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" = 0 then '+' END as "Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",Case when "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" <> 0 then '+' END as "РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( Select Sum("РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ") as "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ" ,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from ( SELECT case when "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "РћС‚СЃСѓС‚СЃС‚РІРёРµ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" END AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё","Р”Р°С‚Р°","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM ( SELECT Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ", CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN 'Р’С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN 'РЎСЂ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN 'Р§С‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN 'РџС‚' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN 'РЎР±' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN 'Р’СЃ' WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN 'РџРЅ' END AS "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" ,sat1.date_th AS "Р”Р°С‚Р°", sat1.THEME_NAME || ' (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ '||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||' РјРёРЅ.)' AS "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°",sat1.ray_name AS "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt inner JOIN (SELECT date_of, count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER RIGHT JOIN (Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,'YYYY-MM-DD') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0 INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1 ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th) GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "Р”РµРЅСЊ РЅРµРґРµР»Рё" not in ('РЎР±','Р’СЃ') and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" like '%РњР°С‚РµСЂРёРЅСЃРєРёР№ (СЃРµРјРµР№РЅС‹Р№) РєР°РїРёС‚Р°Р»%' and "РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" not in ('_3.10 РЎРѕС†РёР°Р»СЊРЅС‹Рµ РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚С‹ - РќР°Р·РЅР°С‡РµРЅРёРµ РµР¶РµРјРµСЃСЏС‡РЅС‹С… РІС‹РїР»Р°С‚ РЅР° РґРµС‚РµР№ РІ РІРѕР·СЂР°СЃС‚Рµ РѕС‚ 8 РґРѕ 17 Р»РµС‚ (РЅРѕСЂРјР°С‚РёРІРЅРѕРµ РІСЂРµРјСЏ 30 РјРёРЅ.)')and"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" not in ('РћРџР¤Р  РїРѕ РђСЂС…Р°РЅРіРµР»СЊСЃРєРѕР№ РѕР±Р»Р°СЃС‚Рё') GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°" Order BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","РљРѕР»-РІРѕ" ) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ") T4) T6 on T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" = T6."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"

Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 5 дней",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 5 дней" --Else "Отсутствие"
,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн''
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T5
inner join (
Select Case when "Отсутствие" = 0 then ''+'' END as "Есть за 3 дня",Case when "Отсутствие" <> 0 then ''+'' END as "Нет за 3 дня" ,"Район" from (
Select Sum("Отсутствие") as "Отсутствие" ,"Район" from (
SELECT case when "Кол-во" = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS "Отсутствие","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT Sum("Кол-во") AS "Кол-во","Услуга","Район" FROM
(
SELECT
CASE
WHEN "Кол-во" IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE "Кол-во" END AS "Кол-во",
"День недели","Дата","Услуга","Район" FROM (
SELECT
Sum(emp.period/sat1.MAIN_PERIOD) AS "Кол-во",
CASE
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 3 THEN ''Вт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 4 THEN ''Ср''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 5 THEN ''Чт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 6 THEN ''Пт''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 7 THEN ''Сб''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 1 THEN ''Вс''
WHEN DAYOFWEEK(sat1.date_th) = 2 THEN ''Пн''
END AS "День недели"
,sat1.date_th AS "Дата",
sat1.THEME_NAME || '' (нормативное время ''||sat1.MAIN_PERIOD||'' мин.)'' AS "Услуга",sat1.ray_name AS "Район"
FROM DB2ADMIN.RUSERS_THEME rt
inner JOIN (SELECT date_of,
count(counter)*5 period,counter,reception_place FROM DB2ADMIN.new_empty_period
GROUP BY counter,reception_place,date_of) emp ON emp.reception_place = rt.ID_RUSER
RIGHT JOIN
(Select sat0.id,sat0.THEME_NAME,sat0.main_period, sat0.ruid,ra.ray_name,sat0.date_th from (SELECT sat.id id,sat.THEME_NAME,sat.MAIN_PERIOD,ru.id ruid,ru.ray_id rura,VARCHAR_FORMAT(dummy3.id,''YYYY-MM-DD'') date_th FROM DB2ADMIN.SPR_ADDRESS_THEME sat,DB2ADMIN.RECEPTIONUSERS ru,dummy3 WHERE sat.disabled=0) sat0
INNER JOIN db2admin.spr_rays ra ON sat0.rura = ra.id) sat1
ON (sat1.ruid= rt.ID_RUSER AND sat1.id = rt.ID_THEME AND emp.date_of = sat1.date_th)
GROUP BY date_th,theme_name,main_period,ray_name
ORDER BY ray_name,date_th,theme_name) T) T1 where "День недели" not in (''Сб'',''Вс'') and "Услуга" like ''%Материнский (семейный) капитал%'' and "Услуга" not in (''_3.10 Социальные выплаты - Назначение ежемесячных выплат на детей в возрасте от 8 до 17 лет (нормативное время 30 мин.)'')and"Район" not in (''ОПФР по Архангельской области'') GROUP BY "Район","Услуга" Order BY "Район","Услуга","Кол-во"
) T2 ) T3 GROUP BY "Район") T4) T6 on T5."Район" = T6."Район" ', REM = '// mainDefer - вызывается после закрытия main программы (для закрытия основного соединия, логгирования, обработки ошибок)

union all
select id + 1 DAY,DAYOFWEEK(id+1 day)-1 from dummy where id <= CURRENT_DATE + 5 DAY
--РїРёС€РµРј РґРЅРё РёСЃРєР»СЋС‡РµРЅРёСЏ
),

--РїРёС€РµРј РґРЅРё РёСЃРєР»СЋС‡РµРЅРёСЏ
)
Select row_number() over(ORDER BY T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ"),'39', T5."Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ",T5."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T5."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 5 РґРЅРµР№",T6."Р•СЃС‚СЊ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ",T6."РќРµС‚ Р·Р° 3 РґРЅСЏ" from
(

,"Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" from (

SELECT Sum("РљРѕР»-РІРѕ") AS "РљРѕР»-РІРѕ","РЈСЃР»СѓРіР°","Р Р°Р№РѕРЅ" FROM

2022/11/15 16:55:20 korsakov2ea/x_func.(*TDatabase).DBExec Выполнена SQL команда. (Строк изменено - 1) INSERT INTO QUERY (NAME, QUERY, REM, ID_CONNECTION) VALUES ('2022-11-14 2022014901 Инвалидность бессрочная в расчетах', 'SELECT 
    M.RE||''/''||M.RA AS "РР", 
    M.NPERS AS "СНИЛС", 
    M.REP_UP_FIO AS "ФИО", 
    M.RDAT AS "ДР", 
    TRIM(NVL(''Трудовая ''||VID_TR.NAME, '''')||NVL('' Государственная 1 ''||VID_GO1.NAME,'''')||NVL('' Государственная 2 ''||VID_GO2.NAME, '''')) AS "Вид пенсии", 
    PEN.DAT AS "Дата", 
    PEN.OPER AS "Опер", 
    PEN.SROKS AS "Срок С", 
    PEN.SROKPO AS "Срок ПО" 
--    TRIM(NVL(''Труд ''||PEN.DATNP_TR,'''')||NVL('' Гос1 ''||PEN.DATNP_G1,'''')||NVL('' Гос2 ''||PEN.DATNP_G2,'''')) AS "Перв. наз", 
--    CASE WHEN PEN.PGP=1 THEN ''ДА'' ELSE ''НЕТ'' END AS "Готовность" 

FROM PF.MAN AS M 
INNER JOIN TEST.VW_MAXRASPEN AS PEN ON PEN.ID=M.ID AND PEN.SROKPO IS NULL AND PEN.OPER NOT IN (''ПРЕ'',''ПРИ'')
LEFT JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_TR ON VID_TR.KOD=PEN.V_TR
LEFT JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_GO1 ON VID_GO1.KOD=PEN.V_GO1 
LEFT JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_GO2 ON VID_GO2.KOD=PEN.V_GO2
WHERE M.PW=0 AND M.DSM IS NULL AND 3 IN (PEN.V_TR, V_GO1, PEN.V_GO2)', 'Выборка дел пенсионеров, получающих пенсию по инвалидности, расчет пенсии которым не ограничен по сроку. Для конроля расчета НВП?', '')

INNER JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_TR ON VID_TR.KOD=PEN.V_TR

INNER JOIN TEST.VW_MAXPEN AS PEN ON PEN.ID=M.ID AND PEN.V_TR=1 AND PEN.NP='РџР Р•' AND PEN.SROKS>='2021-01-01'
INNER JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_TR ON VID_TR.KOD=PEN.V_TR 
INNER JOIN KL.PW AS PW ON PW.KOD=PEN.PW
WHERE M.DSM IS NULL AND M.PW=0

UNION 

SELECT 
    M.RE||'/'||M.RA AS "Р Р ", 
    M.NPERS AS "РЎРќР�Р›РЎ", 
    M.REP_UP_FIO AS "Р¤Р�Рћ", 
    M.RDAT AS "Р”Р ", 
    TRIM(NVL('РўСЂСѓРґРѕРІР°СЏ '||VID_TR.NAME, '')) AS "Р’РёРґ РїРµРЅСЃРёРё", 
    PEN.NP AS "РћРїРµСЂ", 
    PEN.SROKS AS "РЎСЂРѕРє РЎ", 
    CASE WHEN PEN.PGP=1 THEN 'Р”Рђ' ELSE 'РќР•Рў' END AS "Р“РѕС‚РѕРІРЅРѕСЃС‚СЊ",
    CASE WHEN M.VOEPEN=1 THEN 'Р”Р . Р’Р•Р”РћРњРЎРўР’Рћ' ELSE '' END AS "РџСЂРёР·РЅР°Рє",
    PW.NAME AS "РџСЂРёС‡РёРЅР°"    

FROM NAO.MAN AS M 
INNER JOIN NAO.VW_MAXPEN AS PEN ON PEN.ID=M.ID AND PEN.V_TR=1 AND PEN.NP='РџР Р•' AND PEN.SROKS>='2021-01-01'
INNER JOIN KL.VPE AS VID_TR ON VID_TR.KOD=PEN.V_TR 
INNER JOIN KL.PW AS PW ON PW.KOD=PEN.PW
WHERE M.DSM IS NULL AND M.PW=0
